---
title: "What is a Network?"
format: html
previous:
  href: "intro-learning_outcomes.qmd"
  text: "Introduction to Network Analysis"

next:
  href: "intro-nodes_&_edges.qmd"
  text: "Nodes and Edges"
---

*A network is a relational system of interconnected (and sometimes unconnected) actors*

::: callout-note
## Decoded:

-   Relational system → studying how things connect, not just what exists
-   Interconnected → linked through relationships
-   Unconnected → not linked (this also matters!)
-   Actors → people, groups, services, organisations (operational units)
:::

## Interactive Example: Southampton Map

::: {=html}
<iframe src="https://unisotonlibrary.github.io/Reproducible-and-Transparent-Research-Practices-Map/#interactive-network-graph" width="100%" height="600" style="border:none;">

</iframe>
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
